candidates.why: Labeled as revenue; likely component of total revenue but not the main consolidated total. Used as lower-priority fallback.
Explicit top-line total; values match full revenue series. Best primary choice for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Value addition/gains on sales of financial instruments
candidates.why: Financial gains, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT except as last-resort revenue proxy, but other clearer revenue lines exist.
Supplemental revenue; secondary to an explicit total revenue line.
Alternative revenue/turnover component; secondary to explicit total revenue.
Balancing construct used to reconcile revenue; there are duplicate labels. Less appropriate than explicit 'Total Revenue'.

variables.notes: Use priority order so that explicit consolidated 'Total Revenue' is used when available; other revenue/turnover rows serve as historical or fallback definitions if label changes.

candidates.why: Direct costs related to outsourced work; typical COGS component for construction/contracting firms.
Classic direct material cost; core COGS component.

variables.notes: Both rows represent direct production/service costs and should be included as COGS components; later processing will aggregate as needed.

candidates.why: Overhead personnel expenses (non-direct labor) are a core SG&A component.
Likely additional personnel-related overhead; appropriate SG&A component.
Bucket of operating overhead excluding separately reported COGS and D&A; appropriate when no explicit SG&A line exists.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal; use these three as SG&A components. Depreciation and impairments are on separate lines and thus excluded per instructions.
No R&D-related row appears in the candidate list; treat XRD as structurally zero.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line; primary choice for XINT.
Interest component of lease liabilities; a form of interest expense and good secondary line if main interest expense missing.
Represents minority profit allocation, not interest expense; should not be used for XINT.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity attribution, not interest.
Generic interest expense supplemental line; appears to be an alternative label; good fallback if populated in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease-related interest; valid tertiary XINT source.
Asset line, not expense; should not be used for XINT.
Equity component, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list reflects the main all-in interest expense first, then generic interest expense label, then lease-specific interest lines as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Represents net income attributable to owners, not a stock equity balance; not appropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to Equity holders of Veidekke ASA
candidates.why: Flow measure of comprehensive income; not a balance sheet equity stock.
Component of equity but not the total book equity; less appropriate than total equity lines for BE.
Equity component; likely subset; but there is an explicit total equity line.
Explicit total shareholders’ equity attributable to owners (excludes minority interest); best representation of book equity BE.
Total equity including minority interests; slightly broader than shareholders’ equity alone, but secondary candidate if needed.

variables.notes: Use the Balance Sheet 'Total Equity' line, which corresponds to shareholders’ equity excluding minorities and matches the BE definition best.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to minorities; useful but stock MIB is better taken from balance sheet.
Duplicate semantic meaning to non-controlling interests; income statement flow, not stock.
Represents the balance of non-controlling interest in equity; valid stock measure of MIB.
Explicit minority interest equity line; best primary choice for MIB as a stock item.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet equity lines for minority interest; prioritize 'Minority Interest' and use 'Non-controlling interests' as fallback if label changes over time.
